final:
module RefModule (  
    input wire clk,  
    input wire [7:0] addr,  
    input wire [15:0] data_in,  
    input wire we,  
    input wire re,  
    output reg [15:0] data_out  
);  
    reg [15:0] memory [0:255];  

    always @(posedge clk) begin
  if (we) begin memory[addr] <= data_in ; end
  end

  always @(posedge clk) begin
  if (re) begin data_out <= memory[addr] ; end
  end  
endmodule
